case_title: MONCRIEF, CAROL vs. BARNHILL, LENWOOD J.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONCRIEF, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNHILL, LENWOOD J. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3.78 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,097.78 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARNHILL, LENWOOD J.
